skills.section: Add Velt Console prerequisite and update verification checklist
skills.description: Add prerequisite note that the visibility feature must be enabled in Velt Console (console.velt.dev/dashboard/config/appconfig) before use. Also add a verification checklist item for this prerequisite.

driftEvidence.ruleText: Use enablePrivateMode() to set a global visibility default for all new comments in a session, and updateVisibility() to change the visibility of a specific existing annotation. Without explicit visibility control, all new comments are public by default.
driftEvidence.docsText: To use this feature, you need to first **enable** it in [Velt Console](https://console.velt.dev/dashboard/config/appconfig).

p3Items.reason: Low severity with medium confidence — the docs change is under 'Private Comments' section header; unclear if it also applies to the visibility options banner rule. Recommend manual review.
p3Items.description: permissions-visibility-option-dropdown.md may also need the Velt Console prerequisite, but the docs change context is ambiguous for this rule.
